metadata.description: Auth & Security Dashboard — Quality Governance Platform

settings.title: Login Success vs Failure Rate
settings.query: requests | where name contains '/auth/login' | summarize Success=countif(resultCode == 200), Failure=countif(resultCode == 401 or resultCode == 403) by bin(timestamp, 5m) | order by timestamp desc | take 60

settings.title: Rate Limit Hits (429 responses)
settings.query: requests | where resultCode == 429 | summarize Count=count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), name | order by timestamp desc

settings.title: 401 Unauthorized by Endpoint
settings.query: requests | where resultCode == 401 | summarize Count=count() by name | order by Count desc | take 15

settings.title: 403 Forbidden by Endpoint
settings.query: requests | where resultCode == 403 | summarize Count=count() by name | order by Count desc | take 15

settings.title: Failed Login IPs (Top 20)
settings.query: requests | where name contains '/auth/login' and resultCode == 401 | summarize Count=count() by client_IP | order by Count desc | take 20

settings.title: Token Refresh Activity
settings.query: requests | where name contains '/auth/refresh' | summarize Success=countif(resultCode == 200), Failure=countif(resultCode != 200) by bin(timestamp, 15m) | order by timestamp desc
